top_signals.title: Jefferson, Global Economic Developments and the U.S. Economy
top_signals.summary: Speech At the 2026 Bank of Japan-Institute for Monetary and Economic Studies Conference, Tokyo, Japan
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Union Pacific, Norfolk Tumble as Regulator Pauses Merger Review
top_signals.summary: Shares of Union Pacific Corp. and Norfolk Southern Corp. slumped the most in more than a year after a key regulator paused its review of their planned $72 billion merger, potentially delaying what would be the biggest rail deal ever.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
